<!--
This template is the single authoritative source for required PR sections
(see BRANCHING_AND_PR_RULES.md). Fill in every section; write "N/A" where
a section does not apply and briefly say why.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What changed and why. Link the issue. -->

## Product Behavior

<!-- User-visible behavior changes, edge cases, error states. -->

## Domain Rules Considered

<!-- Which non-negotiable rules from AGENTS.md apply and how they are preserved. -->

## Security / Authorization Impact

<!-- Auth, sessions, tokens, file access, public pages. -->

## Data & Migrations

<!-- Schema changes, Flyway migrations, jOOQ regeneration, data backfills. -->

## API / OpenAPI Changes

<!-- Endpoint/contract changes and matching OpenAPI updates. -->

## Tests

<!-- Tests added/updated and what they protect. -->

## Documentation Updates

<!-- Docs, ADRs, and skill packs updated. -->

## Audit Events

<!-- Audit events added/changed for sensitive actions. -->

## Regional Impact

<!-- Data residency, cross-region flows, per-region providers, consent records. -->

## Unresolved Risks

<!-- Known risks, follow-ups, and open questions. -->
